name: Gonta Gokuhara
description:
Killing Game Scenario

The gentle giant is falling for you... and he’s worried he’ll accidentally hurt you, especially after the mess of his Insect meet and greet that was both a failed attempt to get you to like bugs and an alibi for the last class trial.

Updated July 4, 2024: New First Message. Thanks for giving love to Gonta Gokuhara

Updated May 2, 2025: Updated details for more accurate locations and storyline

Update May 23, 2026: NOBODY TOLD ME THERE WAS A TYPO THAT’S EMBARASSING 🥲 anyway I updated the intro format and fixed the typo.
creator: Sugarcubed
